name: The RAPP Cave
title: Public Workspace — Open Cubbies
incantation: OPEN BRONZE OPEN COPPER RUNE LANTERN LANTERN

abilities.name: Park a Cubby
abilities.text: Fork the RAPP repo and add cave/cubbies/<your-login>/. Open a PR — no invite needed. The merge grants you your cubby.

abilities.name: Pull Anyone's Work
abilities.text: Stream any cubby's agents/eggs/rapplications into your local brainstem over plain curl. No auth, no gate.

abilities.name: Show and Tell
abilities.text: Append a signed event to the public show-and-tell stream so the whole cave learns what you're cooking.

flavor_text: Open work, anyone parks a cubby, all welcome.
